items.title: Embedding cache
items.scenario: A RAG pipeline reuses embeddings for the same input text instead of recomputing.
items.explanation: `cache: dict[str, list[float]] = {}` keyed by the (hashed) text gives O(1) hits and avoids redundant API calls.

items.title: Document metadata lookup
items.scenario: After retrieval, you need a doc's title and URL by its id.
items.explanation: A `dict[id, meta]` answers each lookup in O(1) instead of scanning a list of all documents.

items.title: Model pricing table
items.scenario: A billing helper needs the per-token price for whichever model was used.

items.title: Grouping retrieved chunks by source
items.scenario: You want to bundle context by document so each source is cited once.
items.explanation: `groups = defaultdict(list); groups[chunk.doc_id].append(chunk)` builds the grouping in one pass.
